requirement_topic.en: TGSB / PURA / NAWEC Market Access Route for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: TGSB / PURA / NAWEC电动汽车充电桩市场准入路径
requirement_topic.zht: TGSB / PURA / NAWEC電動汽車充電樁市場准入路徑

summary.en: The Gambia Standards Bureau (TGSB) is identified as the national standards body, while PURA regulates public utilities and NAWEC is the electricity utility. A charger import or installation should therefore be screened for TGSB conformity expectations, PURA licensing or operator conditions, NAWEC connection approval, customs classification, labelling, and project-specific donor or fleet specifications. A single official, EVSE-specific mandatory product certification route could not be confirmed from public sources as of 2026-06-14.
summary.zh: 冈比亚标准局（TGSB）被识别为国家标准机构，PURA监管公用事业，NAWEC是电力公用事业单位。因此，充电桩进口或安装应筛查TGSB合格评定预期、PURA许可证或运营商条件、NAWEC接入批准、海关归类、标签，以及具体捐助方或车队项目规格。截至2026年6月14日，未能从公开来源确认单一官方EVSE专门强制产品认证路径。
summary.zht: 甘比亞標準局（TGSB）被識別為國家標準機構，PURA監管公用事業，NAWEC是電力公用事業單位。因此，充電樁進口或安裝應篩查TGSB合格評定預期、PURA許可證或運營商條件、NAWEC接入批准、海關歸類、標籤，以及具體捐助方或車隊項目規格。截至2026年6月14日，未能從公開來源確認單一官方EVSE專門強制產品認證路徑。

standards_or_laws: TGSB standards and conformity route — confirm applicable technical regulations
PURA public-utility regulation, licensing, tariff and service conditions
NAWEC electricity connection and commissioning requirements
IEC 61851, IEC 62196, IEC 61000 as international EVSE evidence baselines

summary.en: China-market EV chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, and GB/T 27930 for DC communication, with China CCC or other domestic approvals depending on product scope. Those documents may support engineering review, but they do not establish Gambia market access, PURA operator acceptance, NAWEC connection approval, or IEC connector interoperability.
summary.zh: 中国市场电动汽车充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准和直流通信GB/T 27930准备文件，并根据产品范围取得中国CCC或其他国内批准。这些文件可支持工程审查，但不能证明已取得冈比亚市场准入、PURA运营商认可、NAWEC接入批准或IEC接口互操作。
summary.zht: 中國市場電動汽車充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準和直流通訊GB/T 27930準備文件，並根據產品範圍取得中國CCC或其他國內批准。這些文件可支持工程審查，但不能證明已取得甘比亞市場准入、PURA運營商認可、NAWEC接入批准或IEC接口互操作。

gap.en: Before quoting or shipping, map the importer, HS code, charger rating, wireless functions, metering functions, connector set, IEC reports, English labelling, spares, installation contractor, NAWEC supply point, PURA status, and TGSB conformity route. Because EV adoption in Gambia is essentially nascent, the main risk is not volume demand but project viability: grid availability, payment model, maintenance, heat/humidity/dust exposure, and availability of compatible vehicles.
gap.zh: 报价或出货前，应梳理进口商、HS编码、充电桩额定值、无线功能、计量功能、接口组合、IEC报告、英文标签、备件、安装承包商、NAWEC供电点、PURA状态和TGSB合格评定路径。由于冈比亚电动汽车采用基本处于起步阶段，主要风险不是需求规模，而是项目可行性：电网可用性、支付模式、维护、热湿粉尘暴露以及兼容车辆可得性。
gap.zht: 報價或出貨前，應梳理進口商、HS編碼、充電樁額定值、無線功能、計量功能、接口組合、IEC報告、英文標籤、備件、安裝承包商、NAWEC供電點、PURA狀態和TGSB合格評定路徑。由於甘比亞電動汽車採用基本處於起步階段，主要風險不是需求規模，而是項目可行性：電網可用性、支付模式、維護、熱濕粉塵暴露以及兼容車輛可得性。

mandatory_status.target: Unconfirmed / project-specific — TGSB conformity, PURA status, and NAWEC approval must be checked for the actual product and site; no blanket EV charger product certification rule was confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic GB/T or CCC evidence is not a Gambia market-access approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim Gambia market access from China GB/T or CCC files alone. Confirm the actual TGSB, PURA, NAWEC, customs, and project-owner requirements for the product and site before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国GB/T或CCC文件宣称已满足冈比亚市场准入。出货前应确认该产品和站点实际适用的TGSB、PURA、NAWEC、海关及项目业主要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國GB/T或CCC文件宣稱已滿足甘比亞市場准入。出貨前應確認該產品和站點實際適用的TGSB、PURA、NAWEC、海關及項目業主要求。

requirement_topic.en: Gambia EV Market Reality — Early Stage, Grid-Constrained Deployment
requirement_topic.zh: 冈比亚电动汽车市场现实——早期且受电网约束的部署
requirement_topic.zht: 甘比亞電動汽車市場現實——早期且受電網約束的部署

summary.en: Gambia is a small West African market with an early-stage or essentially non-existent mass EV charging ecosystem. Public-grid constraints, low electrification in some areas, limited vehicle availability, and maintenance capacity make charging deployment difficult unless tied to a defined fleet, hotel, donor project, solar-plus-storage site, government pilot, or captive-power installation. English labelling and documentation are practical requirements for operators and authorities.
summary.zh: 冈比亚是西非小型市场，大规模电动汽车充电生态仍处于早期或基本不存在。公共电网约束、部分地区电气化水平低、车辆可得性有限和维护能力不足，使充电部署较困难，除非与明确的车队、酒店、捐助方项目、光储站点、政府试点或自备电源安装绑定。英文标签和文件是运营商及主管机构的实际要求。
summary.zht: 甘比亞是西非小型市場，大規模電動汽車充電生態仍處於早期或基本不存在。公共電網約束、部分地區電氣化水平低、車輛可得性有限和維護能力不足，使充電部署較困難，除非與明確的車隊、酒店、捐助方項目、光儲站點、政府試點或自備電源安裝綁定。英文標籤和文件是運營商及主管機構的實際要求。

standards_or_laws: PURA electricity and public-utility regulatory framework
NAWEC electricity supply and connection constraints
IEC EVSE standards used as procurement references where no local EVSE rule is confirmed

summary.en: China has a mature EV and charger market with high-volume domestic GB/T deployments, dense service networks, and operator-specific platforms. That scale does not transfer to Gambia. Hardware, spares, software support, installer training, remote diagnostics, and payment operations must be sized for a small, support-constrained market.
summary.zh: 中国拥有成熟的电动汽车和充电桩市场，国内GB/T部署规模大、服务网络密集，并有运营商专属平台。该规模不能直接转移到冈比亚。硬件、备件、软件支持、安装人员培训、远程诊断和支付运营必须按小型且支持资源受限的市场重新设计。
summary.zht: 中國擁有成熟的電動汽車和充電樁市場，國內GB/T部署規模大、服務網絡密集，並有運營商專屬平台。該規模不能直接轉移到甘比亞。硬體、備件、軟體支持、安裝人員培訓、遠程診斷和支付運營必須按小型且支持資源受限的市場重新設計。

standards_or_laws: China New Energy Vehicle infrastructure policy context

gap.en: Commercial plans should include a site energy audit, expected daily charging sessions, vehicle compatibility list, spare-part kit, local technician training, offline operating mode, surge protection, enclosure sealing, anti-corrosion design, humidity and dust derating, and a realistic maintenance contract. A catalogue GB/T charger exported without a local operator and NAWEC-approved site plan is high risk.
gap.zh: 商业方案应包括站点能源审计、预计每日充电次数、车辆兼容清单、备件包、本地技术人员培训、离线运行模式、浪涌保护、箱体密封、防腐设计、湿热和粉尘降额，以及现实的维护合同。没有本地运营方和NAWEC认可站点方案而直接出口目录型GB/T充电桩，风险很高。
gap.zht: 商業方案應包括站點能源審計、預計每日充電次數、車輛兼容清單、備件包、本地技術人員培訓、離線運行模式、浪湧保護、箱體密封、防腐設計、濕熱和粉塵降額，以及現實的維護合同。沒有本地運營方和NAWEC認可站點方案而直接出口目錄型GB/T充電樁，風險很高。

mandatory_status.target: Market reality — not a product standard, but a practical viability gate for project approval, financing, commissioning, and operation
mandatory_status.cn: China deployment scale and GB/T ecosystem maturity do not reduce Gambia project, grid, or maintenance obligations

source.publisher: World Bank — The Gambia country overview

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Gambia EV charging as a site-engineered pilot or project procurement, not a plug-and-play export market. Grid capacity, operator readiness, maintenance, and IEC-compatible vehicles are as important as product certificates.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将冈比亚电动汽车充电视为站点工程化试点或项目采购，而非即插即用出口市场。电网容量、运营方准备度、维护能力和IEC兼容车辆，与产品证书同等重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將甘比亞電動汽車充電視為站點工程化試點或項目採購，而非即插即用出口市場。電網容量、運營方準備度、維護能力和IEC兼容車輛，與產品證書同等重要。
